headline: Anthropic expands Claude access globally, lifting export restrictions
body: Anthropic has restored and expanded global access to Claude Fable 5 and Mythos 5, removing previous export control limitations. This broadens availability of advanced AI models internationally. For healthcare organizations, expanded Claude access means more pathways to deploy AI in clinical documentation, diagnostic support, and EHR integration without geographic constraints. Healthcare systems evaluating large language models for enterprise use now have clearer access to stable, widely-available options. Vendor landscapes and AI procurement strategies will shift as geographic barriers to major foundational models disappear.
